name: vault-telegram-bridge
description: Capture messages from a Telegram bot into a daily note in your Obsidian vault.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.version: node scripts/version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: N23eos
comment:no-runtime-dependencies: v0.1 (bot mode) ships with zero runtime dependencies: the Bot API is reached through Obsidian's requestUrl. GramJS is a devDependency used only by the throwaway Phase 0 spike, and esbuild.config.mjs fails the product build if src/ ever imports it.
comment:telegram-version: Pinned exactly. The 'latest' dist-tag is the Node build and does not bundle for the browser; only the 'browser' tag does. See docs/SPIKE-REPORT.md 0.1-F1.
